calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Receipts For Funds Placed In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Collinson for and with (administrator) Patricia Adams.

The Court stated that a revised order was needed and asked if there was anything to add in regards to the examiners notes. Mr. Collinson reported that the Guardian ad Litem filed a consent, confirmed with the court that distribution was to go to Ms. Adams and stated that he was having difficulty with the court accepting the proposed order in regards to the tangible items. The Court stated that it would confer with the probate examiner. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to receipt/review of the order). A status of receipt for funds deposited into a blocked account is set for August 19, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
